title: Escape
drDigitalIntro:
The Escape key backs you out of things.
• You'll find it in the very top-left corner.
• Use it to cancel, exit, or leave a full-screen window.
drDigitalSuccess: That's Escape — your friendly 'never mind, back out' button!
drDigitalHint: It's the top-left key, often labeled Esc. Find it, then click Continue.
